programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Denver Broncos quarterback Bo Nix tied a career high with 4 touchdown passes to guide Denver to a win over the Green Bay Packers 34 to 26.

programme.desc: Relive the most shocking postseason upsets in NFL history.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.desc: Players settle into their new quarters at the Jets training camp in upstate New York; coaches take the players through drills.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.desc: The Jets play the New York Giants at the new Meadowlands Stadium; defensive lineman Vernon Gholston competes to impress the coaching staff.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.desc: The Jets travel to Charlotte, N.C. to play the Carolina Panthers; profile of wide receiver Braylon Edwards; the team breaks camp and heads to Florham Park, N.J.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.desc: The Jets visit Long Island for a scrimmage at Hofstra University; competition for a spot in the regular season roster intensifies.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the New York Jets
programme.desc: The Jets travel to Philadelphia to play the Eagles; coaches evaluate player performances and prepare for final roster cuts.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Trailing 27-26, the Rams kept their poise to set up a potential game-winning, 44-yard field goal attempt by kicker Joshua Karty. Instead, Karty's kick was blocked for a second time and returned for a touchdown by Jordan Davis to seal the game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Justin Herbert escaped the Dolphins' pass rush and zipped a pass to Ladd McConkey for a 42-yard catch-and-run, stunning Miami's home crowd in the final minute of Sunday's back-and-forth matchup with the Chargers' 29-27 win.

programme.desc: A surprising performance from one of the competitors turns the already unpredictable competition completely upside down.

programme.desc: One competitor starts to frustrate with spectacular play, and a weakness is detected in one of the favorites.

programme.desc: A controversial comment and reaction during the immunity challenge leads to serious backlash.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The pressure of competition begins to wear down one competitor, and great play is attributed to luck.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: An already tense situation and questionable etiquette leads to one competitor's exile from the group.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The tension boils over, and one competitor is specifically targeted for elimination.

programme.desc: The final four is set, and a long awaited face-off brings out the best and worst of the competitors.

programme.title: The Big Break

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall teaches the putting pointers used by the best players in the world. Martin reveals how to improve on the green with a credit card and a coin; a distance control tip from Ben Crenshaw; a direction drill from Henrik Stenson.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach drills centered around getting more distance. Learn how Davis Love III trains to increase swing speed. Plus, Martin teaches a technique used by Olympic sprinters that translates into crushing it off the tee.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal reveal the seven essential items everyone should use to get the most out of their practice: improve chipping and the full swing with a water bottle, create distance with a rope; improve ball striking with a towel.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall shares the wisdom he's learned from some of the greatest Masters Champions. Learn three big swing keys from Jack Nicklaus, how to hit it like Arnold Palmer with the help of two tees, and numerous drills Tiger Woods did at an early age.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to practice competitively without feeling like you are practicing; long game drills to work on shaping your drives; a fun and useful way to strike every short game shot; how to find your perfect putting pace.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: How skills from other sports such as football, baseball, basketball and hockey can improve the golf swing.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal discuss how to make more putts. Martin teaches several drills to groove one's stroke and increase consistency on the greens. Martin and Blair draw upon PGA Champions Dave Stockton and Tiger Woods for inspiration.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: How to improve on the scariest shots in the game, from forced carries to pitch shots over a bunker; Ray Floyd adjusts to fast greens at Augusta.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teacher have been compiled to make you a better ball striker; Nathalie Sheehan reveals how to eliminate fat contact, Chris Como teaches his Statue of Liberty Drill and Martin Hall goes in-depth.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teachers have been compiled to improve your short game; Devan Bonebrake reveals how to make perfect chipping contact, Aimee Cho teaches how a towel can improve your pitch shots and Martin Hall is featured.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teachers have been compiled to help you out of greenside bunkers; Devan Bonebrake shares Jordan Spieth's sand secret, Nathalie Sheehan teaches a unique grip for bunker shots and James Oh is featured.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top instruction tips from Aimee Cho have been compiled to improve your game from tee-to-green; learn the key 3-wood fundamentals, how to crush your longest drives, a secret to the flop shot and how to flush your long irons.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
